chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 10 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.1214/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.1215/2023 (E/A) 3. For orders on MA No.1216/2023 (R/Surety) 07.12.2023 Mr. Rahmat Ali alias Raza Shaikh, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Sikandar Sadar Siddiqui, Advocate for applicant/surety..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. This application has been filed by applicant Ashique Hussain seeking return of surety. As per contentions of learned Counsel for applicant, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it appears that accused Ali Jan Laghari, who was granted protective bail for a period of seven days, for which applicant stood surety by submitting original Defence Savings Certificates, has appeared before the trial Court within stipulated time on 07.02.2023, as is evident from the order dated 07.02.2023, passed by learned Anti-Terrorism Court, Khairpur, annexed with this application. Thereafter, vide judgment dated 24.05.2023 passed in Special Case No.03/2023, learned trial Court has acquitted the accused. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional Prosecutor General, present in Court in some other matters, after waiving notice, has extended his no objection to grant of this application. Accordingly, listed application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety documents, as above, to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
